concept.title: Common Structural Patterns in DITA Packages
concept.shortdesc: Use common pattern categories to triage package structure before you design migration actions.

ul.li: Main map candidates based on index naming or structural weight.
Abstract map candidates identified by title or structure.
Fallback unknown map role when semantic evidence is absent.
Glossary topic candidates by root element or known structure.
Fallback unknown topic role when a topic has no matching semantic signal.

section.title: Relationship patterns
section.p: Discovery extracts topic references, map references, and media references into relationships. These relationship edges are critical for planning order, dependency analysis, and missing reference diagnostics.

section.title: Triage recommendation
section.p: Start with counts and unresolved structure. If unknown or ambiguous cases repeat across packages, define plugin patterns with stable namespaced IDs so planning can route those cases deterministically.
